summary: Iteration 38 - v5.1.0 Deep Verification PASSED. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: v5.1.0 in footer, Active Trades tab working, Settings > Advanced > Telegram section shows all 6 alert toggles with Auto-Connect and Test Message buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/telegram/status returns configured=true, has_chat_id=true, all 6 alert types enabled
VERIFIED: POST /api/telegram/daily-summary sends daily summary with summary object containing total_pnl, total_trades, wins, losses, win_rate, mode
VERIFIED: POST /api/telegram/alerts toggles individual alert types ON/OFF correctly
VERIFIED: GET /api/exit-advisor/status returns running=true, market_hours field present
VERIFIED: GET /api/exit-advisor/advice returns advice map (empty when no open trades)
VERIFIED: POST /api/exit-advisor/analyze with invalid trade_id returns 'Open trade not found'
REGRESSION PASSED: GET /api/ai-guards/status returns all 8 guards with kelly_sizing and greeks_filter
REGRESSION PASSED: GET /api/position-sizing returns kelly analysis with trading_mode
REGRESSION PASSED: GET /api/options/greeks returns correct greeks (delta, gamma, theta, vega)
REGRESSION PASSED: News fetch endpoint works (external API latency acceptable)
FRONTEND VERIFIED: Active Trades tab shows correctly with 'no trades' message when no open trades
FRONTEND VERIFIED: Settings > Advanced > Telegram section shows all 6 alert toggles (New Signals, Trade Entry, Trade Exit, Daily P&L Summary, Guard Blocks, Exit Advisor)
FRONTEND VERIFIED: Auto-Connect and Test Message buttons present in Telegram section
FRONTEND VERIFIED: Send Daily Summary Now button present
context_for_next_testing_agent: v5.1.0 Deep Verification completed. All critical bug fixes verified: (1) Exit Advisor syncLiveTradeData() function present in exit_advisor.js - syncs LIVE trade prices from Upstox before analyzing, (2) Telegram exit alerts wired in trading.js for auto-exit, paper manual exit, and LIVE manual exit, (3) Guard block alerts wired via notifyGuardBlock() helper in signal_generator.js for Max Daily Loss, Market Regime, and Greeks blocks, (4) Daily summary endpoint POST /api/telegram/daily-summary created and working. Market is currently CLOSED (Saturday). All 8 AI Guards active. Telegram fully configured with 6 alert types enabled.

exit_advisor_live_sync.description: syncLiveTradeData() function added to exit_advisor.js - fetches Upstox positions before analyzing LIVE trades

telegram_exit_alerts.description: Telegram exit alerts added to auto-exit (line 269-272), paper manual exit (line 331-335), LIVE manual exit (line 322)

guard_block_alerts.description: notifyGuardBlock() helper added and wired for Max Daily Loss (line 79), Market Regime (line 119), Greeks (line 277)
